title: The Calcutta Port (Pilotage) Act, 1948
full_text: The Calcutta Port (Pilotage) Act, 1948 कलकत्ता पत्तन (यान मार्गदर्शन)अधिनियम,1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194833 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1948-04-16 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Calcutta Port (Pilotage) Act, 1948 Hindi Title: कलकत्ता पत्तन (यान मार्गदर्शन)अधिनियम,1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer of control over pilotage on the River Hooghly to the Commissioners for the Port of Calcutta. Ministry: Ministry of Shipping Enforcement Date: 16-05-1948 Notification: 16th May, 1948, vide notificaiton No. 27-M (iii)/47, dated 19th May, 1948, see Gazette of India, 1948, Part I. TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Calcutta Port (Pilotage) Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Commissioners’ duty to maintain pilots. Section 4. Appointment of pilots. Section 5. Rules regulating Pilots. Section 6. Levy of pilotage fees. Section 7. Pilot age fees and fines and penalties levied under the Act. Section 8. Repealed. Section 9. Power to transfer moneys from the general account to pilot age account and vice versa. Section 10. Application of certain provisions of Bengal Act 3 of 1890. Section 11. Repealed.
